videos.headline: Keyvone Lee gives UNLV its first touchdown
videos.description: Keyvone Lee runs it in for a 6-yard touchdown vs. Wyoming.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Keyvone Lee gives UNLV its first touchdown) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaden Bradley returns the blocked punt for a UNLV touchdown
videos.description: Kayden McGee blocks the Wyoming punt and Jaden Bradley is there for the scoop and score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaden Bradley returns the blocked punt for a UNLV touchdown) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Deion DeBlanc puts Wyoming on the board
videos.description: Deion DeBlanc finds the end zone to give the Cowboys their first touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Deion DeBlanc puts Wyoming on the board) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Colandrea finds Jai'Den Thomas for another UNLV touchdown
videos.description: Anthony Colandrea finds Jai'den Thomas open for a touchdown and the Rebels go up 31-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Anthony Colandrea finds Jai'Den Thomas for another UNLV touchdown) 2025/10/04 ESHEET
